instruction: Discuss potential mitigation strategies for this vulnerability.
input: An issue has been discovered in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions before 15.5.7, all versions starting from 15.6 before 15.6.4, all versions starting from 15.7 before 15.7.2. A race condition can lead to verified email forgery and takeover of third-party accounts when using GitLab as an OAuth provider.
output: Mitigation strategies include updating GitLab CE/EE to versions 15.5.7, 15.6.4, 15.7.2, or later to patch the vulnerability. Additionally, reviewing OAuth implementation for race conditions and strengthening validation mechanisms can help prevent exploitation.
